field_values.action_summary: Under the cover of darkness, Kantos Kan claims his freedom while Carter uses the chaos/darkness to slip away from the arena toward the eastern hills.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-light/Night cinematography; Tracking shots of Carter moving through shadows; Wide establishing shot of the eastern hills
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting consistency between moonlight and torchlight sources
Physical condition of john_carter (injuries from previous scenes)
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH019_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from the chaotic arena environment to a stealth-driven escape sequence. The visual language must shift from the high-energy chaos of the subterranean amphitheater to the quiet, low-light tension of the dark outskirts and eastern hills.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- kantos_kan (in distance/background)

## Required Environments
- Arena perimeter / Dark outskirts
- warhoon_eastern_hills

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting: Moonlight vs Torchlight balance.
- Physicality: john_carter injury status from previous scenes.

## Beat List
- BT001: Kantos Kan claims freedom in the distance.
- BT002: Carter moves through the dark outskirts.
- BT003: Carter enters the eastern hills.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
